programme.desc: Nu het team na de Ierse serie steeds meer onder de loep werd genomen, voerde hoofdcoach Ian Foster radicale veranderingen door in zijn coachingteam en haalde aanvallerscoach Jason Ryan van de Crusaders. Ryans nuchtere aanpak hielp het lot van de All Blacks in Afrika te veranderen, maar de wittebroodsweken waren van korte duur.

programme.title: Voetbal Geeft
programme.desc: Sven (30) leeft voor voetbal en media. Door een blessure moest hij stoppen met voetballen, hij vond gelukkig snel een nieuwe manier om met zijn passie bezig te zijn. Met zijn eigen video's wil hij laten zien dat mensen met een beperking veel meer kunnen dan vaak wordt gedacht. Via Fortuna Sittard kreeg Sven onlangs een bijzondere kans als reporter bij een VriendenLoterij Eredivisiewedstrijd.

programme.title: Ep.3

programme.title: GP Giappone: Gara

programme.title: Ep.1
programme.desc: Ep.1 - Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: in questo episodio il sensazionale percorso giovanile di Antonelli che lo ha portato a sostituire Hamilton in Mercedes a soli 18 anni.

programme.title: Ep.2
programme.desc: Ep.2 - Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: in questo episodio il percorso di Antonelli nella massima categoria. Gli alti e bassi dell'anno da rookie, prima della definitiva esplosione del 2026.

programme.title: Ep.3
programme.desc: Ep.3 - Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: il legame con la famiglia, le amicizie speciali e il mito di Senna. In questo episodio Antonelli ci svela le sue passioni e ci apre le porte di casa.

programme.title: GP Miami: Gara
programme.desc: GP Miami: Gara - In Florida quarta gara stagionale: nelle prime tre, ben due vittorie di Kimi Antonelli, leader della classifica. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: GP Giappone: Gara
programme.desc: GP Giappone: Gara - Terza gara della stagione sulla mitica pista di Suzuka: la Mercedes ha vinto i primi due GP, la Ferrari non trionfa in Giappone dal 2004. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero

programme.title: Shanghai: Gara 2

programme.title: Ep.3
programme.desc: ... 08/05/2026 F2: Chasing the Dream. - La F2 e' ancora la porta d'accesso alla F1? Anche se troppi campioni restano al palo e tanti arrivano dalle Academy, il campionato cadetto rimane oggi l'ascensore per la serie A.

programme.title: Performance E Design: All'origine Delle Emozioni
programme.desc: ... Delle Emozioni. - Il legame tra F1 e produzione di serie valorizzato da Audi: in vetrina alla Milano Design Week la R26 protagonista del mondiale e la nuova RS 5, la prima ibrida plug-in del marchio dei quattro anelli.

How The Ryder Cup Was Won
programme.desc: A look back at The 1997 Ryder Cup at Valderrama. This was the first time Europe had played on home soil outside of the British Isles in the event. Tiger Woods made his debut for America.

programme.title: Wells Fargo Championship 2024 Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2024 Wells Fargo Championship, held at Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. Wyndham Clark scooped the $3,600,000 prize pot last year.

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, more tips from Zach Johnson.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Lyle Practice Shots
programme.desc: Two-time Major champion and Hall of Famer Sandy Lyle gives you his tips for success on the course. Here, Sandy explains the essential shots that every golfer needs to practice.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, how to chip effectively close to the green. Ep 18.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Ep 19.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day two of the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at Quail Hollow Club in Charlotte, North Carolina. Sepp Straka outfought Shane Lowry this time last year to claim victory.

programme.desc: From instruction tips for your game, to fitness advice and lifestyle lessons, hear from the best on the circuit in PGA Tour Champions Learning Centre.

programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at Quail Hollow Club. Sepp Straka outfought Shane Lowry for the win at this event a year ago.

programme.title: Live LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round three of the Mizuho Americas Open, an LPGA Tour tournament taking place at Mountain Ridge Country Club in New Jersey. Jeeno Thitikul of Thailand was crowned last year's champion.

programme.title: How The Ryder Cup Was Won
programme.desc: A look back at the 2002 Ryder Cup at the Belfry. Sam Torrance captained Europe brilliantly, as Paul McGinley sealed his place in Ryder Cup folklore by sealing the win for the hosts.

programme.title: Truist Championship 2025 Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at the Philadelphia Cricket Club. 2025 Masters champion Rory McIlroy claimed victory last season.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Sorenstam Full Swing
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, golf star Annika Sorenstam offers tips on the full swing.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Learning Centre
programme.desc: From instruction tips for your game, to fitness advice and lifestyle lessons, hear from the best on the circuit in PGA Tour Champions Learning Centre.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day three of the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at Quail Hollow Club. Sepp Straka outfought Shane Lowry for the win at this event a year ago.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes: Scotland
programme.desc: Opening at the Renaissance Club, Chris then ventures to Kingsbarns, reuniting with Paul McGinley. Trump International in Aberdeen comes next as Dundonald Links and Royal Troon follow.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The final day of the inaugural Estrella Damm Catalunya Championship at Real Club de Golf El Prat in Barcelona, marking the start of the European Swing on the DP World Tour.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day four of the PGA Tour's Truist Championship, taking place at Quail Hollow Club. Sepp Straka outfought Shane Lowry for the win at this event a year ago.

programme.title: PGA Championship Official Film2014
programme.desc: The official film of the 2014 PGA Championship from Valhalla Golf Club in Kentucky. Jason Dufner entered this tournament as defending champion.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2018
programme.desc: The 2018 Bahrain Grand Prix from the Bahrain International Circuit in Sakhir. Sebastian Vettel will start on pole as he looks for back-to-back wins to begin the season.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2018
programme.desc: The 2018 Chinese Grand Prix from the Shanghai International Circuit. Sebastian Vettel starts on pole as he looks to extend his Championship lead, with Lewis Hamilton back in fourth.

programme.desc: Second-round highlights from the 2026 British Kart Championship, taking place at Whilton Mill in Northamptonshire.

programme.desc: Opening-round highlights from the 2026 British GT Championship. Comprising eight races this campaign, the racing officially commenced with the three-hour Silverstone 500.

programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live as he gathers reaction from inside the paddock and reviews all the biggest stories from qualifying at the Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Miami F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out for the Miami Grand Prix. Kimi Antonelli, polesitter for a third consecutive race, has Max Verstappen for company on the front row, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. (03.05)

programme.title: Ted's Notebook: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live following the Miami Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reaction from the paddock.

programme.title: Australian F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out for the season-opening Australian Grand Prix. George Russell leads a Mercedes front-row lockout with Red Bull's Isack Hadjar third. Lando Norris starts from P6. (08.03)

programme.title: Chinese F1 GP: Sprint
programme.desc: Shanghai sees the first of six F1 Sprints this season as George Russell leads a Mercedes front row with Lando Norris third. The fast-starting Ferraris line up in P4 and P6. (14.03)

programme.title: Chinese F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out for the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix. Formula 1's youngest-ever polesitter Kimi Antonelli leads a Mercedes one-two as the fast-starting Ferraris come from the second row. (15.03)

programme.title: Japanese F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out at Suzuka. Back-to-back poleman Kimi Antonelli leads a third consecutive Mercedes one-two as Oscar Piastri starts P3. Lando Norris separates the Ferraris in fifth. (29.03)
